So it's getting, you know, the AI treatment, but then we're doing all the cleanup, you know?
Yeah.
Yeah, cool.
Yeah, the AI is not there that it can just do everything itself.
There isn't a, we were literally just talking about this in a leadership call.
There isn't a single system today that doesn't need some sort of bit of review and its outputs that just nails it across the board.
Whether it's the researchers we use, the Xs, the perplexities, whatever, they all need some form of human intervention to validate, like, it is doing this stuff accurately.
Maybe there is a day where, you know, that is to a less of a degree in the not-too-distant future.

I'm not optimistic about that, not to run us over too much, but I think they're so hell-bent on it being friendly as a pal to people that need that, that it hurts the use case for people like us that need it to be objective.
And it's programmed to be friendly and hallucinate because of that in-built.
Yeah, Claude thinks I'm a genius.
Right.
It's free to meet every time, yeah.
It doesn't want to say, I don't know.
You have to say, if you don't know, don't  say, you know, right?
Because by default, it's going to just make something up because it wants to be your helpful pal.
And I'm not sure they're ever going to be able to like, even if they can, I don't think they're going to pull it out.
One of the weird ones.
So when I was working on that brief, essentially my process of how I do this is, you know, I go to a cloud, I give it my requirements, I do voice notes, and I say, this is what I'm thinking about.
This is what needs to be captured.
It gives me a draft.
Okay, this is what needs to tweak and just kind of continue to go through it.
It saves the time.
And I thought this was just so odd.
It put my name at the top and it said Kyle Weatherly.
I was like, who the  is Kyle Weatherly?
Why do you think that's my last name?
That's pretty damn funny.
I love that, though.
Yeah, just, it'll even, and even when you tell it to not make things up, remember that one where I was doing.
And some sort of thing where I was doing like, just having it generate like content titles based on some factors I gave it.
And I gave it actual keywords with actual search volume.
And it just made keywords and search volume up out of nowhere.
And was like, and Kyle caught it.
And I was like, but I gave it real information.
Why is it just using what?
Yeah.
So.
Hey, maybe that's good for all of us.
They're not going to replace everybody just yet.
That's true.
Cool.
Well, thanks for running a bit over.
Yeah, no problem.
Appreciate you guys.
Yeah, Carrie, I'll try not to let my SEO review block get destroyed by some other random fire or something tomorrow.
So.
You got it.
I'll drop you the link.
Yeah.
Yeah.
I appreciate that.
But yeah, should be good.
Sweet.
Sounds good.
Appreciate the time, Joel.
All right.
Yeah, you too.
See you.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, plan the FAQ glossary, and conduct a client pulse check.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Organic Growth:** GrowthX content drove 60% organic traffic growth (last 4 wks) and an 84% increase (last 2 mos), with a new "Policy Enforcement" cluster seeing nearly 200% WoW growth.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**FAQ Glossary Approved:** Joel approved the "glossary" (to avoid confusion with another FAQ) and will assign a full-stack engineer next week to build the simple Webflow template.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [**Client Pulse Check:** Joel gave a highly positive review, citing the team's senior expertise and strategic thought partnership as key differentiators from past agencies.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** Next week's content is ready for review; future topics will be batched in groups of \~10 to streamline Joel's approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Organic Traffic Growth:**](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
      - [**Last 4 weeks:** +60%](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [**Last 2 months:** +84%](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
      - [Engagement metrics grew at a similar rate.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**"Policy Enforcement" Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**WoW Growth:** \~200% (53 → 158 sessions).](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Significance:** Strong early signal for a new content bet, with only a few articles live for two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Competitor & LLM Trends (via Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Observation:** Scrunch data shows Hotel Engine's AI visibility rising while competitors (Navan, Concur) are leveling off.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [**Caveat:** Kyle noted Scrunch data has been volatile recently, making it difficult to isolate the cause of trends (e.g., a holiday slowdown vs. a data model change).](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)

### FAQ Glossary Plan

  - [**Project Name:** "Glossary" (to avoid confusion with an existing internal FAQ).](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [**Goal:** Create simple, high-impact content to capture AI Overviews (AEO) and drive consistent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [**Owner:** Joel will assign a full-stack engineer next week.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
      - [**Scope:** Build a simple Webflow template, treating it as a new blog category to minimize engineering effort.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [**Focus:** Helpful, objective comparisons highlighting Hotel Engine's unique strengths (e.g., built for field crews).](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Avoids legal issues and the "whack-a-mole" of tracking competitor feature changes.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [**Competitor Context:**](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
          - [**Concur:** A new partnership may change the comparison narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
          - [**Navan:** Hotel Engine already has a "Navan alternatives" landing page to capture IPO-related search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### Client Pulse Check

  - [**Overall Feedback:** Highly positive. Joel praised the team's thought partnership and the scalability of the content program.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
      - [**Senior Expertise:** Direct access to experienced leaders (Kyle, Marcel) and managing editors (Carrie) is a major advantage over past agencies that used junior staff.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
      - [**Product Knowledge:** The team's research is so thorough that it has uncovered product features Joel was unaware of.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Joel:** Review next week's content by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [**Joel:** Assign a full-stack engineer next week to build the FAQ glossary template.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [**Carrie:** Send Joel the link for next week's content review.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Carrie:** Batch future content topics in groups of \~10 for streamlined approval.](https://fathom.video/share/jQ-Hy9AGwM35NyAXj8GyNL3uX_XPYb_C?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

action_items.description: Review next week's content; decide publish 5th this week or roll to next
Build Glossary template as blog category; assign full-stack engineer next week
Investigate Scrunch AI visibility volatility; share findings w/ Joel
Test AI Notebook GPT for FAQ/Glossary question generation
